tasks.prompt:
Check the CI pipeline status for GitCode PR #513 (https://gitcode.com/cann/hixl/pull/513). 

Run this curl command to check the labels:
curl -s "https://api.gitcode.com/api/v5/repos/cann/hixl/pulls/513/labels" | python3 -c "import sys,json; labels=json.load(sys.stdin); ci=[l['name'] for l in labels if 'ci' in l['name'].lower()]; print(ci)"

If labels show `ci-pipeline-passed`: Report "CI PASSED - all checks green!" and CANCEL this cron job.
If labels show `ci-pipeline-failed`: Report "CI FAILED - need to fix". Fetch the PR page or CI logs to understand the failure, then fix the code in /Users/youxiao/codes/hixl on the dev branch, commit, and push. After pushing, resume monitoring.
If labels still show `ci-pipeline-running`: Report "Still running..." and let the cron continue.
